description.value: ValueSet containing creatinine-based renal function LOINC identifiers from the Renal Function 2000 panel.

copyright.value: This material contains content from LOINC (http://loinc.org). LOINC is copyright © 1995-2020, Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and the Logical Observation Identifiers Names and Codes (LOINC) Committee and is available at no cost under the license at http://loinc.org/license. display.value: Glomerular filtration rate [Volume Rate/Area] in Serum or Plasma by Creatinine-based formula (MDRD)/1.73 sq M
Glomerular filtration rate [Volume Rate/Area] in Serum, Plasma or Blood by Creatinine-based formula (MDRD)/1.73 sq M among female population
Glomerular filtration rate [Volume Rate/Area] in Serum, Plasma or Blood by Creatinine-based formula (MDRD)/1.73 sq M among non black population
Glomerular filtration rate [Volume Rate/Area] in Serum, Plasma or Blood by Creatinine-based formula (MDRD)/1.73 sq M among black population
